c.d: Number of unique users who actively engage with the game within a month, indicating popularity and community size
c.s: App store analytics, developer reports, third-party analytics platforms

c.d: Average rating score from user reviews across app stores, reflecting overall user satisfaction and game quality
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, user review aggregators

c.d: Monthly revenue generated through in-app purchases, advertisements, and premium features
c.s: App store revenue reports, analytics platforms, developer financial disclosures

c.d: Variety of gameplay mechanics and genres represented to ensure broad appeal across different gaming preferences
c.s: App store categories, game descriptions, gaming review sites

c.d: Frequency of content updates, bug fixes, and new feature releases indicating active development and long-term viability
c.s: App store update history, developer changelogs, gaming news sites
